data.title: Bybit enters DeFi with Byreal launch on Solana in bid to outpace rivals
data.description:
The Bybit crypto exchange is set to launch a decentralized exchange (DEX) on the Solana network by the end of this month. The company CEO, Ben Zhou, announced the launch of the new product, Byreal, on X. According to Zhou, Byreal is a hybrid DeFi protocol that combines centralized exchange (CEX) liquidity with DEX transparency. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bybit-defi-byreal-launch-on-solana/

data.title: Analysis: KOGE may be hit first because ZKJ has contracts and better liquidity, which requires more funds to hit the market.
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa's analysis, the most important reason for smashing KOGE first and then ZKJ may be that ZKJ has a contract, and they can smash the market on the chain at the same time by opening a short position on the exchange; secondly, from the perspective of liquidity, ZKJ's liquidity will be better, and it will cost more money to smash the market; 
The LP ranges of ZKJ and KOGE are extremely narrow. After a large number of smashes through this range, there will be insufficient funds to undertake the sell orders, and a flash crash will inevitably occur. When LP sees the price of the currency falling, they will also flee in panic, and the vicious cycle will cause the price of the currency to collapse further; it is speculated that the decline in Alpha's trading volume for several consecutive days may be the cause, and the exit of a large number of LPs is also a game of "running fast".

data.title: Chart of the Week: Bitcoin's Summer Lull Still Offers 'Inexpensive' Trading Opportunity
data.description:
"Hey bitcoin, Do Something!" The viral meme — starring a stick figure poking the ground and depicting a need for reaction — might just sum up the current scene at digital assets trading desks during the slow, early summer days. Sure, bitcoin BTC just hit new fresh highs and is still trading above $100,000, but the P&L is diminishing daily for short-term volatility chasers. "Bitcoin’s volatility has continued to trend lower, both in realized and implied measures, even as the asset reaches new all-time highs. This decline in volatility is particularly notable amid historically high price levels," said NYDIG Research in a recent note shared with CoinDesk
source: https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2025/06/15/chart-of-the-week-bitcoin-s-summer-lull-still-offers-inexpensive-trading-opportunity

data.title: Echo Protocol successfully retrieved the official X account, user security was not affected, and the team promised to continue to strengthen protection
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Echo Protocol officially announced today that its official X account (@EchoProtocol_) has been successfully retrieved this morning. The account is currently operating normally and the team has fully recovered control.
According to the Echo team, the official account was hacked and temporarily controlled by an unknown person yesterday. During this period, false information and suspicious links unrelated to the project were released, which attracted widespread attention from the community. In response, the team immediately activated the emergency response mechanism and communicated and cooperated with the X official, and finally successfully regained control of the account today.
Echo Protocol stated that this incident only affected the social platform account, the protocol itself operated normally, all user funds and data remained safe, and there was no abnormality in the platform contract. Please feel free to use it.
The team also further stated in response to this incident that it will continue to trace the source of the hack in the future and take legal action as appropriate. At the same time, Echo Protocol has immediately strengthened internal account protection measures and called on community members to be vigilant about information security and avoid clicking on any unknown links or executing suspicious authorizations.

data.title: Analysis: Tonight's ZKJ and KOGE flash crash may be a long-planned harvesting operation
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa’s analysis, the flash crash of ZKJ and KOGE tonight may be a long-planned harvesting operation. The three main addresses targeted the huge trading volume and liquidity of the two tokens in the background of Binance Alpha. Tonight, the dual pressure of "large withdrawal of liquidity + continuous selling" caused ZKJ and KOGE to collapse one after another, and no one was spared.
1. Address 0x1A2...2759920:28:21 and 20:33:15 withdrew 61130 KOGE (about 3.76 million US dollars) and 273017 ZKJ (about 532,000 US dollars) of bilateral liquidity in two times
20:28:58 - 20:36:57 During the period, 45470 KOGE was exchanged for ZKJ, worth 3.796 million US dollars, and the transaction volume on the KOGE chain increased significantly during the period
20:30:57 - 20:59:49 During the period, 1.573 million ZKJ were sold in batches for USDT and BNB, worth 3.052 million US dollars, with an average selling price of $1.94
At this time, both KOGE and ZKJ experienced a small step-by-step decline, but did not plummet.
2. Address 0x078...8bdE720:30:33 withdrew bilateral liquidity of 33651 KOGE (about 2.07 million US dollars) and 709203 ZKJ (about 1.38 million US dollars)
20:31:10 - 20:58:18 period, 36814 KOGE was exchanged for ZKJ, worth 2.26 million US dollars
20:35:15 - 20:37:34 period, 1 million ZKJ was sold, worth 1.948 million US dollars, with an average selling price of $1.948
The "relay-style dumping" of this address finally pushed the KOGE coin price to fall rapidly, which is the continuous large negative lines of the K-line that everyone sees.
3. Address 0x6aD...e2EBb received 772,759 ZKJ transferred from address 0x078...8bdE7 (the previous dumping address) at 20:41:55, worth $1.5 million
772,000 ZKJ were liquidated during 20:42:28 - 20:50:16
The third address mainly cooperated to further catalyze the decline of ZKJ after the KOGE price collapsed, completing the harvest of the two token LPs and holders.

data.title: Pakistan Explores Bitcoin as a Tool for Monetary Resilience
data.description: According to Odaily, Pakistan's Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb recently met with Michael Saylor, the Executive Chairman of Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy. The discussion focused on the potential use of Bitcoin as a tool for enhancing monetary resilience.

data.title: A crypto trader was kidnapped and beaten in France, but was later released due to insufficient account funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that a 26-year-old trader was kidnapped on his way back to his home in Juvisy-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, from Friday to Saturday night. He was forcibly taken to a stolen Clio car by four kidnappers. According to preliminary information, the victim has 40,000 followers on TikTok and was beaten after being kidnapped. The kidnappers asked him for 50,000 euros in cryptocurrency, but after checking his account balance and finding a small amount, the kidnappers released him because they found that the victim did not have the required amount. The case has now been taken over by the organized and professional crime investigation department. (europe1)
